name: Jalapeno Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound hot Italian sausage, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 pound sweet Italian sausage, cut into 1 inch pieces
1/3 pound jalapeno chilis chopped (wear gloves), up to 1/2 teaspoon
3 cans (36 oz.) Italian plum tomatoes, drained
2 pounds fresh Italian plum tomatoes, quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sausages and water in a pan and brown. Drain.
2. In a separate pan, sauté onions and garlic in oil until softened. Add ground chuck and cook until lightly browned.
3. Add chopped green and red peppers and jalapeno chilis to the meat mixture and cook until wilted.
4. Stir in canned tomatoes, wine, and tomato paste. Cook for 10 minutes.
5. Add the spices (chili powder, cumin, oregano, basil, black pepper, and salt) and fennel seeds. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
6. If desired, degrease the chili by skimming fat or using a slotted spoon to remove excess oil before adding fresh tomatoes.
7. Stir in the quartered fresh Italian plum tomatoes and cook until heated through, about 10 minutes.
